mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, avatar, header_background, phone) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{headerBackground}, #{phone})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20
